- Author: Lucky Verma
- arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23434

- GitHub profile: 97 public repositories and 126 total stars as of 2026-06-26.

- InfiniteContext-1B: active long-context LLM architecture workbench.

## Disclosure Note
Some production systems, reviewer records, and research artifacts contain confidential customer data, private venue material, or unreleased benchmark details. The public website intentionally limits those descriptions to verifiable and disclosable facts.
